filters._comment: Attribute-based filtering using Duke's official course tags (REG-*, COMP-*, etc.)

program_specific._comment: Exclude courses tied to specific certificate/program cohorts

filters._comment_exclude_closed: Filter out courses that are closed or waitlisted

title_keywords._comment: Exclude courses with these keywords in title (case-insensitive)

constraints._comment_user_class_year: Set to 'first_year', 'sophomore', 'junior', or 'senior' to filter class-year-restricted courses. null = show all courses regardless of restrictions.

prerequisite_filter._comment: Filter out courses where you haven't completed at least one prerequisite (now supports cross-listings!)
